top_signals.title: Trump Team Seeks Longer Gas Tax Holiday With Phased-In Return
top_signals.summary: The Trump administration is working with Congress to suspend federal excise taxes on gasoline and diesel as the war in Iran drives up oil and fuel costs.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Trump flexes endorsement power for Ken Paxton after ousting Cassidy, targeting Massie
top_signals.summary: Paxton and Cornyn are locked in a bitter Texas Senate runoff that will decide which Republican faces Democrat James Talarico in November.
